stemHtml: What is true about the No Transgression Zone (NTZ) of independent parallel approaches?

options.a: Pilots cannot penetrate the NTZ and the NTZ area will be smaller than the combined TODA, TORA and LDA.
options.b: Pilots cannot penetrate the NTZ and the NTZ area will be bigger than the combined TODA, TORA and LDA.
options.c: ATC ensures that no aircraft penetrates the NTZ.
options.d: ATC allows aircraft to briefly penetrate the NTZ but not cross it to avoid collision with traffic on the parallel approach.
